ksa_text: Knowledge of data modeling and schema design techniques, including conceptual, logical, and physical modeling approaches, entity-relationship diagrams, dimensional modeling approaches for analytics, and design trade-offs between normalization and query performance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("schemas?", "data model", "normali"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3689); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 3 job-posting-level and 1 certification-level matches (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Competency appears regularly in DE role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
